initiatives.name: We Are Family
initiatives.description: A grassroots organization fostering mutual aid and community support for LGBTQ+ youth in Charleston. They coordinate direct assistance, resource sharing, and solidarity networks while building power through youth empowerment, mental health support, gender-affirming gear distribution, and creating affirming spaces for queer and trans youth to thrive.

initiatives.name: Charleston Water Keeper
initiatives.description: We defend and restore Charleston's waterways so you can fish and swim without pollution.

initiatives.name: Food Not Bombs Charleston
initiatives.description: A ragtag leftist collective combatting hunger & food waste in North Charleston

initiatives.name: Elbit Out of SC
initiatives.description: We are a coalition of local groups and neighbors united against Elbit Systems manufacturing deadly weapons in our backyard.

initiatives.name: CSO Charleston Chapter
initiatives.description: Charleston Chapter of the Community Service Organization | Fighting for the oppressed in the South Carolina Lowcountry.

initiatives.name: Free Palestine Charleston
initiatives.description: Local community in support of a free Palestine

initiatives.name: Low Country Action Committee
initiatives.description: We are a Black led grassroots organization dedicated to Black liberation through service, political education, and collective action in the Lowcountry.

initiatives.name: Lowcountry Rising for Palestine
initiatives.description: An organization of working class Lowcountry residents in solidarity with the Palestinian people in their struggle against Zionist occupation.
